subject: [PATCH v4 4/5] io_uring/rsrc: rename and export IO_IMU_DEST / IO_IMU_SOURCE

2026-03-27.patch_summary: This patch renames and exports two io_uring flags, IO_IMU_DEST and IO_IMU_SOURCE, to IO_BUF_DEST and IO_BUF_SOURCE respectively. This change is necessary for the io_buffer_register_bvec() path where callers may need a buffer to be both readable and writable. The patch updates several files including include/linux/io_uring_types.h, io_uring/io_uring.c, io_uring/rsrc.c, and io_uring/rsrc.h. It removes the original flags and adds the new ones with the same values. This change allows subsystems to use these flags to specify buffer direction.
